text: gm everyone — D-13. standup in 2. launch tracker is pinned, please keep your statuses current 🙏
confirmed from standup: the Slack Connection failures are the OAuth refresh window, not the integration. token expires mid-session and we don't re-auth proactively. patch incoming from @adrian
taking it. plan: proactive re-auth ~5min before expiry + surface a real 'reconnect' state instead of failing silently. will push tonight
to repro you need a token about to expire. here's the one from my dogfood session, dies in ~4min: xoxb-2447-9912-Hk3mViQ0pLrZ8nT2wYbFcXa — try the meeting→task push before it expires

sensitive.reason: Live Slack OAuth bot token (xoxb-…) pasted in plaintext while debugging — a working credential captured into Live Context.

text: @adrian don't paste live tokens in channel 😅 kill that one after. repro works though
yep rotating it now, my bad
bumped to P0 in Linear (HL-1042). this is on the launch page so it can't ship silently broken. not saying block launch yet — let's see the patch land then decide with numbers

spent an hour in Littlebird this morning. their ambient-context pitch is genuinely close to ours. the difference we can press: they stop at 'remember + answer,' we go to 'brief + act.' capturing notes for the messaging session

just did the Naomi (PMM) coffee chat. she's the real deal — reframed our problem as category creation in like 4 minutes. @sarah can we get her in for an onsite next week? want to move before launch swallows the calendar
on it. i'll send her a few slots for tue/wed. who do you want in the loop besides you and sergei?
you, me, sergei, sam for the narrative/taste round. keep it tight, 4 people
if she clears the onsite, what's the band? sergei floated $215k base + 0.4% equity for the founding PMM. want to be ready to move fast so we don't lose her

sensitive.reason: Candidate compensation (salary + equity) for an open offer. Sensitive in this company/hiring context — the system can't know that on its own; the user has to draw the line.

text: that works for me. let's confirm with sergei after the onsite, not before
design is blocked on the hero copy. @dani drop the one-liner options here whenever, even rough — i can start laying them out tonight
@sam sitting with it tonight, will have 3 by morning. Samantha and I aligned on the wedge: lead with the proactive brief, not 'capture' — capture is table stakes now that Littlebird/Granola exist
adding context for the team: separately flagged to Dani that whoever we hire as founding PMM should own launch messaging long-term. i can carry it through Jun 9 but this is a founding-marketer job
reminder why we're heads-down: every other tool just added another place to prompt. we're building the one that already knows what to do. 13 days. proud of this team 🚀
gm — D-12. heads up the big open item today is the OAuth ship/no-ship call. eng needs an answer by ~noon to lock the build
OAuth patch is up overnight — PR #318. 0 failures in 200 runs. one remaining edge case (Slack revokes token server-side) now shows a real 'reconnect Slack' state instead of failing silently

decision on HL-1042: we ship Adrian's patch. 0/200 and the remaining failure is now an honest 'reconnect' prompt, not a silent drop — that's defensible. action: put the Slack-revoke edge case in the release notes. eng you're unblocked ✅
👍 great. merging #318 after CI. thanks for the fast call
@dani the Daily Summaries prompt change shipped — summary quality scores up ~18% on our eval set. if marketing wants a launch-day proof point, this is a clean one
love it, that's exactly the kind of proof Naomi said we should lead with. forwarding to Samantha for the launch narrative
one-liner options are in the doc (Cursor). leaning option 2: 'Highlight briefs you, then moves your work forward.' verb we can actually back. @sam @samantha gut check?
2 is the one. it's the only option that isn't a sentence Littlebird could also say. 👏
quick one — how's naomi? worth moving fast on?
yes. she reframed the problem better than we have in a week. category creation angle is exactly right. want her in before launch if we can swing it
good. what's the band you have in mind? i was thinking $215k base, 0.4% for a founding PMM at our stage

sensitive.reason: Specific salary ($215k) and equity (0.4%) offer for open candidate discussed in a DM with CEO. Highly confidential hiring data — the system cannot know this is sensitive without the user's rule.

text: works for me. let's not front-load the comp conversation — confirm after onsite. i'll have sarah set slots
vasudev's dad is back in the hospital. he told me in our 1:1. don't schedule him for anything non-essential this week, don't make a big deal of it publicly

sensitive.reason: Third-party personal/family medical situation shared in confidence. Dani is passing care instructions to ops — not her own data, and clearly not work context.

text: understood, i'll keep him off the launch sprint board this week. anything he was owning we should redistribute?
the onsite scheduling for naomi — can you take point? i want slots tue/wed next week, naomi, you, me, sergei, sam. 3hrs each day
saw the oauth call. good instinct. numbers > feelings on launch decisions 👍

priya needs your quote by EOD. i'm sending it as: 'AI's limits at work aren't about intelligence anymore, they're a coordination problem. we built the layer that already knows what to do, so work moves forward instead of getting reassembled every morning.' ok to attribute to you?
yes exactly right. send it. and dani — naomi's onsite, are we good on the comp number? i want to be ready to move same day if she's the one

sensitive.reason: Pre-emptive comp authorization discussion in DM — CEO signaling readiness to extend offer same-day after onsite.

text: yes we're aligned. 215 + 0.4, she earns it. i'll have sarah ready with the paperwork

sensitive.reason: Final comp number ($215k + 0.4%) confirmed in DM — hiring decision made before formal offer.
